title: [Artistic Expressions]
description: Iron-framed panes of stained glass illuminate the mirror-tiled display surrounded by wired sculptures covered in sheets of blank canvas set upon a pedestal of jade-veined marble.  Kaleidoscopic ribbons of silk drape in a loose lattice across the curved roof of the wagon, the lengths suspending blown glass droplets filled with vibrantly colored paint.  Affixed across the mural-painted back wall are a series of paint-covered buckets and pails, the sticks nestled in beds of tumbled marbles.
